subject: Apr 12th, 2026
fact: The session date is recorded as Apr 12th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Apr 12th, 2026

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is an Arcanoloth involved in a three-way confrontation in the dining hall.
source_quote: three-way confrontation they had engineered between Vraxen the Arcanoloth

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a fire giant involved in a three-way confrontation in the dining hall.
source_quote: the fire giant Veperyd

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is the High Inquisitor involved in a three-way confrontation in the dining hall.
source_quote: High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Daein
fact: Daein lifted the stolen key from the obsidian table.
source_quote: stolen key Daein had lifted from the obsidian table

subject: stolen key
fact: The party uses a stolen key to access the lift.
source_quote: Armed with the stolen key Daein had lifted from the obsidian table

subject: obsidian table
fact: The stolen key was lifted from an obsidian table.
source_quote: lifted from the obsidian table

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas noticed that their imp guide had vanished.
source_quote: Akritas noticed with a quiet unease that their imp guide had vanished entirely

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur mocked the ancient Abyssal operating system powering the lift.
source_quote: mocked the ancient and notoriously unreliable Abyssal operating system powering the device

subject: bypassing the lift lock
fact: Felkur bypassed the lift's locking mechanism so cleanly that no one below would notice it had been touched.
source_quote: bypassing it so cleanly that no one below would notice it had been touched at all

subject: fifty-foot corridor
fact: The party found themselves at the entrance to a long, fifty-foot corridor lined with floor tiles.
source_quote: entrance to a long, fifty-foot corridor lined with floor tiles

subject: magical glyph
fact: The second tile in the corridor was rigged with a devastating magical glyph.
source_quote: the second tile was rigged with a devastating magical glyph

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called upon a powerful enchantment that stripped away all illusions and concealments.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon a powerful enchantment that stripped away all illusions and concealments

subject: revealing trap pattern
fact: Through Bramgrim's sight, the traps were revealed to be laid upon tiles corresponding to prime numbers.
source_quote: the traps were laid upon tiles corresponding to prime numbers

subject: stone golem
fact: A stone golem was guarding the vault door.
source_quote: Guarding the door was a stone golem

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear had been bounding across the Arcanoloth's table and picked up Vraxen's scent.
source_quote: Owlbear, who had been bounding across the Arcanoloth's table not long before and had picked up the smell

subject: scent extraction device
fact: Felkur produced a device he had originally built to extract unpleasant flavors from his food.
source_quote: produced a device he had originally built to extract unpleasant flavors from his food

subject: extracting scent
fact: Felkur used the device to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear.
source_quote: extracting Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear

subject: golem stepping aside
fact: The stone golem stepped silently aside after registering the familiar scent.
source_quote: it stepped silently aside

subject: vault door
fact: The vault door was a formidable thing of adamantine and mithril.
source_quote: vault door itself was a formidable thing of adamantine and mithril

subject: vault chamber
fact: The vault chamber was cool and precisely maintained.
source_quote: The chamber was cool and precisely maintained

subject: soul coins
fact: The vault walls were lined with shelves bearing soul coins.
source_quote: walls lined with shelves bearing soul coins

subject: infernal ledgers
fact: The vault walls were lined with shelves bearing infernal ledgers.
source_quote: infernal ledgers

subject: contracts
fact: The vault walls were lined with shelves bearing contracts written in the language of devils.
source_quote: contracts written in the language of devils

subject: crystal dome
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths rested beneath a crystal dome on a stone pedestal.
source_quote: resting beneath a crystal dome on a stone pedestal

subject: stone pedestal
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths rested on a stone pedestal.
source_quote: on a stone pedestal

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths was a massive tome bound in devilhide.
source_quote: Lexicon of Oaths — a massive tome bound in devilhide

subject: processed soul pages
fact: The Lexicon's pages were made from processed souls that glowed with a soft, eerie light.
source_quote: pages made from processed souls that glowed with a soft, eerie light

subject: automatic updating
fact: The Lexicon automatically updated itself with every infernal contract struck across Maerimydra.
source_quote: automatically updating itself with every infernal contract struck across Maerimydra

subject: discovering Transaction 44781
fact: Felkur found Transaction 44781 in the Lexicon.
source_quote: Transaction 44781, dated to a winter night long past

subject: priceless brooch
fact: Transaction 44781 recorded the sale of a priceless brooch belonging to the high priests of Maerimydra.
source_quote: sale of a priceless brooch belonging to the high priests of Maerimydra

subject: Felkur Oldenwood
fact: The brooch was sold by Felkur Oldenwood, who was intoxicated at the time.
source_quote: sold by one Felkur Oldenwood, intoxicated

subject: selling the brooch
fact: Felkur sold the brooch for the sum of forty-five gold pieces.
source_quote: for the sum of forty-five gold pieces

subject: Limping Oric
fact: The brooch was sold to a fence named Limping Oric.
source_quote: to a fence named Limping Oric

subject: brooch's ward
fact: The brooch had a ward that made its bearer completely impervious to magical location.
source_quote: a ward that made its bearer completely impervious to magical location

subject: Phantom Thief
fact: Felkur unknowingly became the Phantom Thief due to the brooch's ward.
source_quote: Felkur had unknowingly become the Phantom Thief

subject: conspiracy theories
fact: Felkur's theft sparked paranoid conspiracy theories.
source_quote: sparked paranoid conspiracy theories

subject: executions
fact: Felkur's theft led to multiple executions of high investigators.
source_quote: multiple executions of high investigators

subject: years of searching
fact: Felkur's theft led to years of fruitless searching across Maerimydra.
source_quote: years of fruitless searching across Maerimydra

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass had sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on the party.
source_quote: Maram il Vass had sold Felkur's information and placed a contract on the entire party

subject: finding the loophole
fact: Felkur found a loophole stating that if the Lexicon no longer contained the information, the contract was null and void.
source_quote: if the Lexicon no longer contained the information needed to identify him, the contract was null and void

subject: altering the entry
fact: Felkur replaced his own name with that of High Inquisitor Veris in the Lexicon.
source_quote: carefully replacing his own name with that of High Inquisitor Veris

subject: forging new entry
fact: Felkur forged a new entry attributing the original theft to the Phantom Thief.
source_quote: forged a new entry attributing the original theft to the Phantom Thief

subject: crediting the Phantom Thief
fact: Felkur added a new entry crediting the Phantom Thief with stealing the record itself.
source_quote: added a new entry crediting the Phantom Thief with stealing the record itself

subject: Vraxen's personal journal
fact: The party discovered Vraxen's personal journal detailing plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors.
source_quote: discovered Vraxen's personal journal, which detailed the Arcanoloth's secret plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors

subject: Yugoloth
fact: Vraxen planned to betray his Yugoloth superiors.
source_quote: betray his Yugoloth superiors

subject: soul coin ledger
fact: A soul coin ledger recording every infernal transaction in Maerimydra sat on a nearby shelf.
source_quote: A soul coin ledger recording every infernal transaction in Maerimydra sat on a nearby shelf

subject: Faerzess Shard
fact: Felkur slid a large pure crystal known as Faerzess Shard into his pack.
source_quote: slid a large pure crystal — Faerzess Shard, a powerful enhancer of artificer abilities — quietly into his pack

subject: elevator
fact: The party heard the sound of the elevator beginning to move.
source_quote: The sound of the elevator beginning to move

subject: pursuit approaching
fact: The party heard the unmistakable grinding of stone and the approach of pursuit.
source_quote: unmistakable grinding of stone and the approach of pursuit

subject: golem fail-safe reactivating
fact: The stone golem's fail-safe began to reactivate.
source_quote: stone golem's fail-safe beginning to reactivate

subject: hidden door
fact: Bramgrim spotted a hidden door concealed within the vault's walls.
source_quote: Bramgrim spotted a hidden door concealed within the vault's walls

subject: climbing secret passage
fact: The adventurers climbed upward through the secret passage toward the very peak of the spire.
source_quote: climbing upward through the secret passage toward the very peak of the spire

subject: circular chamber
fact: The party emerged into a vast circular chamber open to the poisonous clouds above.
source_quote: emerged into a vast circular chamber open to the poisonous clouds above

subject: permanent teleportation circle
fact: A permanent teleportation circle pulsed with sickly green light in the circular chamber.
source_quote: permanent teleportation circle pulsed with sickly green light

subject: recalibrating the circle
fact: Felkur set to work recalibrating the circle using his tools and the arcane crystals.
source_quote: Felkur immediately set to work recalibrating the circle using his tools and the arcane crystals

subject: Owlbear guarding hatch
fact: The Owlbear planted itself over the floor hatch.
source_quote: The Owlbear planted itself over the floor hatch

subject: Akritas readying bow
fact: Akritas readied her bow toward the iron door leading to the staircase.
source_quote: Akritas readied her bow toward the iron door leading to the staircase

subject: iron door
fact: The iron door led to the staircase.
source_quote: iron door leading to the staircase

subject: Daein providing support
fact: Daein positioned himself to provide support.
source_quote: Daein positioned himself to provide support

subject: Bramgrim casting protection
fact: Bramgrim cast a protective enchantment over Felkur to shield him from direct assault.
source_quote: Bramgrim cast a protective enchantment over Felkur to shield him from direct assault

subject: magical mandolin
fact: Daein used the magical mandolin to render Felkur invisible.
source_quote: Daein used the magical mandolin to render Felkur invisible

subject: Felkur becoming invisible
fact: Felkur became invisible and slipped behind one of the chamber's stone pillars.
source_quote: allowing the gnome to slip behind one of the chamber's stone pillars

subject: stone pillar
fact: Felkur slipped behind one of the chamber's stone pillars.
source_quote: behind one of the chamber's stone pillars

subject: completing critical stages
fact: Felkur successfully completed the first critical stages of the recalibration.
source_quote: Felkur successfully completed the first critical stages of the recalibration

subject: crystals humming
fact: The crystals began to hum with redirected energy.
source_quote: crystals beginning to hum with redirected energy

subject: Veris arriving
fact: High Inquisitor Veris arrived with the sound of heavy stone footsteps.
source_quote: sound of heavy stone footsteps and the furious voice of High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Veris threatening revenge
fact: Veris declared he would have Felkur's head and get his revenge.
source_quote: I will have his head. I will get my revenge

subject: golem smashing door
fact: The stone golem smashed the iron door from its hinges.
source_quote: The stone golem smashed the iron door from its hinges

subject: Veris entering chamber
fact: Veris stormed into the chamber with his face twisted with fury.
source_quote: Veris stormed into the chamber, his face twisted with fury

subject: Veris questioning forgery
fact: Veris snarled that he would not be killed by the likes of the party.
source_quote: Did you think I would not find your forgery? Blaming me? I will not be killed by the likes of you!

subject: Daein shoving golem
fact: Daein attempted to shove the golem back through the ruined doorway.
source_quote: Daein attempted to shove the golem back through the ruined doorway

subject: Owlbear attacking golem
fact: The Owlbear threw itself at the golem with raking magical claws.
source_quote: The Owlbear threw itself at the golem with raking magical claws

subject: Bramgrim summoning guardians
fact: Bramgrim called upon spectral guardians that swirled through the chamber like a storm of vengeful spirits.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon spectral guardians that swirled through the chamber like a storm of vengeful spirits

subject: Felkur deploying cannon
fact: Felkur deployed his eldritch cannon which fired a crackling blast into the stone golem's flank.
source_quote: deployed his eldritch cannon, which swiveled and fired a crackling blast into the stone golem's flank

subject: Akritas shooting golem
fact: Akritas marked the golem as her quarry and loosed a well-aimed shot that struck true.
source_quote: Akritas marked the golem as her quarry and loosed a well-aimed shot that struck true

subject: Veris teleporting
fact: Veris teleported across the chamber to reposition himself.
source_quote: Veris, unwilling to be caught in the swirling chaos of the spirit guardians, teleported across the chamber to reposition himself

subject: eldritch cannon
fact: Felkur deployed his eldritch cannon.
source_quote: deployed his eldritch cannon

subject: spirit guardians
fact: Spectral guardians swirled through the chamber like a storm of vengeful spirits.
source_quote: swirled through the chamber like a storm of vengeful spirits

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The party escaped the dining hall of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: escapes the dining hall of the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: thieves' tools
fact: Felkur used his thieves' tools to expertly unlock the physical mechanism of the vault door.
source_quote: Felkur uses his thieves' tools to expertly unlock the physical mechanism of the vault door

subject: Abyssal 23
fact: Felkur mocked the outdated 'Abyssal 23' operating system.
source_quote: mocking the outdated 'Abyssal 23' operating system

subject: blank infernal contracts
fact: The party discovered blank infernal contracts in the vault.
source_quote: and blank infernal contracts

subject: arcane crystals
fact: Felkur used the arcane crystals the party had collected to recalibrate the circle.
source_quote: using his tools and the arcane crystals the party had collected
